::: {.callout-important .difficulty-easy icon="false"}
## Guidance

1.  Read each question carefully before you begin answering it.
2.  Check your answers seem right.
3.  Always show your workings.
:::

::::: {#exr-u1-conv-table}
### Conversion Table

Complete the following table:

| Fraction      | Decimal | Percentage |
|:--------------|:--------|:-----------|
| $\frac{1}{2}$ | ...     | ...        |
| ...           | 0.75    | 75%        |

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 🔍 View Solution

-   **Row 1:** $\frac{1}{2} = 0.5 = \mathbf{50\%}$
-   **Row 2:** $\mathbf{\frac{3}{4}} = 0.75 = 75\%$
:::

::: exercise-meta
[Topic: Conversion Table]{.badge .topic-badge} [Skills: Basic Conversions]{.badge .skill-badge}
:::
:::::
